positive: Minimalist retro abstract cityscape silhouette, viewed through a stylized window frame. The composition features layered geometric shapes and simplified representations of skyscrapers and natural elements (like mountains and gentle waves). Use a restricted, high-contrast color palette of deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and off-white cream. The style should be inspired by mid-century modern graphic design, emphasizing strong negative space and clean, defined edges. Dramatic flat lighting, suitable for screen printing on fabric, with a perfect central focal point. Vector illustration quality.
